data.title: Lattice Semiconductor authorizes $250M stock repurchase program to enhance market leadership. #LSCC
data.description: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (Nasdaq: LSCC) has received approval from its Board of Directors to buyback $250 million worth of its common stock. Lorenzo Flores, the Chief Financial Officer, expressed confidence in the company's financial stability, stating that this move enables them to provide returns to shareholders and still focus on investments that enhance their dominance in Small and Mid-Range FPGAs, and advance their Companion.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets report on South Korea's colocation data center portfolio from 2025-2028 shows Seoul as focal point with multiple 100MW+ mega-campuses, 58 operational data centers, 850 MW IT load capacity, and top 3 operators: LG Uplus, KT Cloud, and SK broadband.
data.description: Dublin - A database titled "South Korea Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The forthcoming data centers in South Korea are primarily focused in Seoul, with prominent involvement from hyperscale and telecom operators. Development includes numerous mega-campuses exceeding 100MW in size. Presently, South Korea accommodates around 58 operational data centers, boasting a collective IT load capacity of about 850 MW. Leading the industry are LG Uplus, KT Cloud, and SK broadband.

data.title: Palantir and TWG AI partner with Teton Ridge, utilizing NVIDIA for real-time AI and computer vision in rodeo.
data.description: An innovative collaboration between Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) and TWG AI has been unveiled in Denver. Together, they are teaming up with Teton Ridge, a western sports and entertainment company supported by TWG Global, to introduce cutting-edge real-time AI and computer vision technology to the world of rodeo. This partnership aims to enhance and quicken the sport experience for athletes, fans, and partners. The venture will also involve NVIDIA in the endeavor. Teton Ridge, the proprietor of Cowboy Channel and associated western sports and media platforms, has been working alongside PRCA-sanctioned rodeos in the past year to conduct tests and trials for this new initiative.

data.title: HNI and Steelcase release initial merger consideration election results for Steelcase shareholders in Muscatine & Grand Rapids.
data.description: HNI and Steelcase have revealed preliminary results regarding the election of the merger consideration form for Steelcase shareholders. The announcement was made in Muscatine, Iowa, and Grand Rapids, Michigan. Key numbers from the announcement include the merger consideration options available for Steelcase shareholders.

data.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust releases 7th Corporate Sustainability Report in Bethesda, highlighting sustainability efforts.
data.description: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust, a Maryland-based real estate investment trust (REIT), has released its seventh annual Corporate Sustainability Report. This report highlights the company's commitment to sustainable practices and showcases its efforts to reduce its environmental impact. The report covers various initiatives undertaken by Pebblebrook Hotel Trust to promote sustainability, including energy-saving measures, waste reduction programs, and community engagement projects. This initiative demonstrates the company's dedication to corporate social responsibility.

The driver’s cab on an articulated lorry was left hanging off an icy West Virginia bridge after losing control in a major winter storm. Fire crews raced to hoist the trapped driver to safety as snow and ice snarl travel across the Northeast and mid-Atlantic.

data.title: Victoria’s Secret & Co. (NYSE: VSCO) announces Q3 2025 results and raises full-year guidance in Reynoldsburg, Ohio.
data.description: In Reynoldsburg, Ohio, on December 5, 2025, Victoria’s Secret & Co. (referred to as VS&Co or the Company) announced its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on November 1, 2025. The company's stocks, traded under the ticker symbol VSCO on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), were detailed in the report.

data.title: Otis project at Incheon Airport, S. Korea wins Elevator World award. Recognized for excellence in elevator industry.
data.description: A project located at Incheon International Airport in South Korea has been acknowledged by Elevator World in Farmington, Connecticut. On December 5, 2025, Elevator World magazine announced that Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) has been chosen as the recipient of the Project of the Year award. This prestigious recognition highlights the success of the project, showcasing Otis Worldwide Corporation's excellence in the field.

data.title: FitVille offering $1,000 and travel-ready shoes in Christmas Travels event. Enter to win dream holiday trip.
data.description: Don't miss the opportunity to win $1,000 cash along with a pair of FitVille shoes by participating in the "Christmas Travels, FitVille Gifts" event. This exciting contest, launched by FitVille in NEWARK, Del. on Dec. 5, 2025, allows participants to share their dream holiday trips for a shot at the prizes. Two fortunate winners will be selected to receive this amazing package.

data.title: Perpetua enhances leadership team for Stibnite Gold Project; key additions announced.
data.description: Perpetua Resources Corp. (Nasdaq: PPTA / TSX: PPTA), a leading company in the mining industry, revealed its latest move to enhance the management and execution of the Stibnite Gold Project in Boise, Idaho on December 5, 2025. Through bringing in additional expertise and leveraging their deep experience, Perpetua aims to ensure the successful delivery of the project. This strategic decision comes as part of the Company's ongoing efforts to strengthen their position in the market and capitalize on opportunities for growth and innovation.

data.title: Netflix to acquire Warner Bros. for $82.7B post Discovery separation; creates a powerful entertainment offering.
data.description: Netflix has acquired Warner Bros.' renowned franchises and extensive libraries in a significant transaction. This collaboration will bring together Netflix's popular entertainment service with Warner Bros.' vast content. As a result, consumers can expect a wide range of options and enhanced value. Netflix will continue to operate Warner Bros.' current offerings, making this a beneficial arrangement for all parties involved.
NETFLIX TO BUY WARNER BROS. FOR $27.75/SHARE IN CASH, STOCK

data.title: Gensource Potash Corp updates on Tugaske Project in Saskatchewan, secures land purchase option.
data.description: In Saskatchewan, Gensource Potash Corporation, a fertilizer company (TSXV: GSP), has updated on its Tugaske Project. The company has completed the land purchase for the project site. Gensource specializes in sustainable and modular potash production. The Tugaske Project is the flagship project, located in Saskatchewan.

data.title: Trimble announced $1.0 billion share repurchase authorization without expiration date.
data.description: In Westminster, Colo., on December 5, 2025, Trimble® revealed plans to repurchase $1.0 billion worth of shares of its common stock, as approved by the Board of Directors. This authorization for stock repurchase has no set expiration date and supersedes any previous plans.
